title: Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content: Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth. Police Scotland said it received a report of a "suspicious item" found at the base around 11:25am on Thursday.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Bomb disposal squad detonate 'suspicious package' at RAF Lossiemouth
